name: Hi-C
description:
'''Christian Shaw''' (born January 31, 1998),{{Citation needed|date=March 2026}} known professionally as '''Hi-C''', is an American rapper and record producer. Hi-C co-founded the collective Reptilian Club Boyz in 2016. The nickname "High C" was given by Shaw's then-boss, who thought he was [[Substance intoxication|high]] all the time. Shaw then adopted the nickname as his stage name. 

In 2023, ''[[The Fader]]'' reviewed Hi-C's album ''L3Ft 4 D3ad'' and noted him as "a key force in the development of [[HexD]] music". Shaw has been noted as an influence on rappers [[Xaviersobased]] and preme4l. He has also collaborated with Xaviersobased, MikeBrokeAsf, rockstarcliff, selfmadesav, Lil Yawh, WiFiGawd, [[Gods Wisdom]], [[Cooper B. Handy]], and former Reptilian Club Boyz member Cartier'God.
